description_long: This object is a collection of various road traffic signs, each mounted on a metallic post. The signs are predominantly circular with red, blue, and white backgrounds, featuring a range of regulatory symbols and numbers such as speed limits, directional arrows, and prohibition marks. The posts are arranged in neat rows, suggesting a set for urban or roadside deployment. The faces of the signs display clear, high-contrast graphics for visibility, including speed limits, no entry, and directional instructions. The rear of each sign is plain and metallic, with no visible markings. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the posts and sign backs, with reflective painted or laminated surfaces for the sign faces.
description: A grouped set of circular road traffic signs on metal posts, featuring various regulatory symbols and speed limits in red, blue, and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, with clear visibility of symbols, numbers, and colors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the signs and the alignment of the posts in rows.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the circular tops of the signs and the grid-like arrangement of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edges of the signs and the posts, with some sign faces partially visible.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: arrows, bicycles, U-turn, no entry, speed limit numbers, prohibition symbols
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, parking lot entrances, and roadways
